data.name: A simple, real-time server monitoring system designed for local deployment. Keep an eye on your infrastructure with intuitive dashboards and detailed metrics.
data.value: A simple, real-time server monitoring system designed for local deployment. Keep an eye on your infrastructure with intuitive dashboards and detailed metrics.

data.name: AnduinOS is a custom Ubuntu-based Linux distribution that offers a familiar and easy-to-use experience for anyone moving to Linux.
data.value: AnduinOS is a bespoke Ubuntu-based Linux distribution that provides a familiar and user-friendly experience for anyone transitioning to Linux.

data.name: Discover the benefits of working with us.
data.value: Discover the benefits of working with us.

data.name: Enterprise business framework for the Open-source & AI era.
data.value: Enterprise business framework for the open-source and AI era.

data.name: Supercharge your native Ollama with enterprise-grade API authentication, request auditing, and virtual model management—your secure, private AI gateway.
data.value: Enhance your native Ollama with enterprise-grade API authentication, request auditing, and virtual model management—your secure, private AI gateway.

data.name: Unified endpoint management (UEM), identity management (IAM), and collaboration tools (OA) in one package. All on your local servers!
data.value: Unified endpoint management (UEM), identity management (IAM), and collaboration tools (OA) in one package. All on your local servers!
